name: Aging Analysis
query:
SELECT
    si.customer,
    si.name as invoice,
    si.due_date,
    si.outstanding_amount,
    DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), si.due_date) as days_overdue,
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), si.due_date) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN '0-30'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), si.due_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), si.due_date) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90'
        ELSE '90+'
    END as aging_bucket
FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
WHERE
    si.docstatus = 1
    AND si.outstanding_amount > 0
    AND si.due_date < CURDATE()
ORDER BY days_overdue DESC
